candidates.calculation_time: After campaign replay window is available; in live mode updates from start until ignition.
feature_dependency: Replay rows or live campaign rows with mae_pct
candidates.meaning: Maximum adverse excursion observed before or at campaign ignition.
candidates.usage: Primary Campaign Physics discriminator for distinguishing healthy early absorption from failed campaigns.

candidates.calculation_time: After peak MFE is observed; in live mode provisional until campaign peak/end.
candidates.meaning: Peak favorable excursion divided by absolute Early MAE.
candidates.usage: Measures whether the campaign recovered and expanded enough to justify the initial drawdown.

candidates.calculation_time: When Early MAE timestamp is known; live value updates while early drawdown evolves.
candidates.meaning: Speed of early adverse movement from campaign start to Early MAE.
candidates.usage: Secondary risk physics candidate; 12S did not prove it as a stable discriminator.

candidates.calculation_time: After campaign end; live mode can expose elapsed duration as provisional.
candidates.meaning: Elapsed hours between campaign start and campaign end.
candidates.usage: Context metric only; 12S reconfirmed it is not a discriminator.

position.reason_before_mirror: Campaign Physics describes measurable campaign movement and recovery from replayable market/outcome rows. Mirror Pattern should consume these physical facts instead of inventing pattern meaning directly from raw feature lines.

purpose: Represent Campaign-level physical behavior before Mirror Pattern interpretation.
